title: KawaMood's Waystones in Shrines of Dungeons and Taverns
description: Addon that generates KawaMood's Waystones in shrines of Dungeons and Taverns. This allows players to access fast travel points within shrines.
body:
Addon that generates KawaMood's Waystones in shrines of Dungeons and Taverns. This allows players to access fast travel points within shrines.

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2229bed890a94d7db413e714fe5c5c9190be9fc.png)

**You have to download [KawaMood's Waystones](https://modrinth.com/datapack/waystones-data-pack) and [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns) for the datapack/mod to work!**

**If you're going to use it on a server, set "enable-command-block" to true in server.properties.**
# Structures
**🚪 Waystones in Shrines**

With this addon, now all shrines of Dungeons and Taverns become travel points with Waystones!


<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

[NovaWostra](https://modrinth.com/user/NovaWostra) - Creator of Dungeons and Taverns
